# Performance and Memory Expert Skill

This skill covers performance-sensitive and allocation-sensitive work in pgPacTool, especially in
extraction, comparison, script generation, packaging, and parser/native-loading paths.

## Use this skill when changing
- extraction hot paths
- compare/publish loops
- large-schema generation flows
- parser/native loading behavior
- areas with repeated allocations or repeated I/O
